skip_reason: QA NOGO: C1 introduced behavioral regression — cycle_number enforcement in GitCommitTool is only enforced on the explicit workflow_phase path (Pydantic validator), not on the auto-detect path. The current hardcoded 'implementation' string check is architecturally wrong; cycle enforcement must be config-driven via is_cycle_based_phase(workflow_name, phase). Returning to research to document the correct config-driven fix strategy before planning and implementation.
issue_title: MCP tool schema audit: surface constraints to prevent first-use errors
